summary: This source is a brief TEDx talk description. It highlights Jürgen Schmidhuber's foundational role in modern AI and notes his view that the current emergence of artificial intelligence is a historical moment comparable only to the origin of life in the universe.

principles.statement: The emergence of true artificial intelligence is a historical moment comparable in importance to the emergence of life in the universe.
principles.rationale: He views the development of AI not merely as a technological advancement, but as a fundamental, evolutionary shift in the history of the universe.
principles.source_quote: ...we are witnessing a moment in history whose importance can only be compared to the emergence of known life in the universe, some 3.5 billion years ago.

mental_models.name: AI as a New Genesis
mental_models.description: Viewing the creation of true artificial intelligence as an evolutionary leap on par with the emergence of biological life 3.5 billion years ago.
